title: Quiz copy, English spectrum, and language navigation fixes
scope: AI Governance Persona quiz and adjacent spectrum/profile pages

items.description: Simplify the intro instruction that currently says users will answer 16 short questions and should choose the closest option even when no answer is perfect.
items.current_text_zh: 你将回答 16 个简短问题。每题选择最接近你看法的选项；即使没有完美答案，也请选择相对最接近的一项。有些问题会比较抽象，也可能带有政治或价值判断。如果两个答案都部分正确，请选择更接近你默认判断的那个。
items.desired_direction: Make it much shorter: tell users to choose the closest answer; clarify that most questions are single-choice, while the final persona check is multi-select.
items.notes: Implemented with short copy: 大多数题目请选择一个最接近的答案；最后一题可以多选。 English copy mirrors the same rule.

items.description: The English Governance Spectrum link opens a very old page that is inconsistent with the Chinese version.
items.desired_direction: Remove or stop linking to the old English spectrum page. Keep the Chinese two-dimensional stance map as the source of truth, but provide an all-English version of that same map/page.
items.notes: Implemented: replaced old English spectrum links with ai-governance-spectrum-en.html and deleted ai-thought-spectrum-visualization-en.html.

items.description: Add Chinese/English switching on both the spectrum page and persona profile page, with a consistent top-right position.
requirements: Every relevant page should show the language switch in the top-right corner.
The switch should move users to the corresponding page in the other language.
Spectrum page and persona profile page both need this, not only the quiz page.
items.open_question: Button label logic is not final. User suggested: in Chinese state show '中文/English'; in English state show 'EN/CH', but wants discussion before implementation.
items.discussion_note: Consider a more consistent pair such as '中文 / EN' on both languages, or show the current language first and target second. Avoid ambiguous labels if it looks like a toggle rather than a state indicator.
items.notes: Implemented top-right language links on spectrum and persona profile pages: Chinese pages show 中文 / English; English pages show EN / CH.

items.description: The word 'Gatekeeper' is strange or unclear for many users, especially in Chinese context.
items.desired_direction: Replace or explain gatekeeper language in C03 / related copy with more accessible Chinese wording, such as '把关者', '少数控制者', '准入门槛', or a fuller phrase depending on context.
items.notes: User said this was already changed elsewhere; do not edit C03 in this pass.

validation: Run npm run quiz:check after quiz text changes.
Verify Chinese and English page links manually after language navigation changes.
Check that stale English Governance Spectrum page is no longer reachable from current navigation.
